query: INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, videoUrl, readingMaterial, assignment, lessonOrder) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG'), 'Complex Texts Analysis', 'Develop skills for analyzing complex informational and literary texts.', 'https://example.com/video/complex-texts', 'Analyzing Complex Texts', 'Analyze complex passages', 14), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG'), 'Standard English Conventions', 'Master grammar, usage, mechanics, and spelling tested on GED RLA.', 'https://example.com/video/conventions', 'English Conventions Reference', 'Correct sentence errors', 15), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG'), 'Writing for Different Purposes', 'Learn to write for different purposes and audiences.', 'https://example.com/video/writing-purposes', 'Writing Purposes Guide', 'Write samples for different purposes', 16), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG'), 'RLA Test-Taking Strategies', 'Develop time management and test-taking strategies for GED RLA.', 'https://example.com/video/rla-strategies', 'RLA Strategies Guide', 'Practice timed questions', 17), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG'), 'RLA Practice and Review', 'Comprehensive review of all RLA topics with practice questions.', 'https://example.com/video/rla-review', 'RLA Review Guide', 'Complete RLA practice test', 18);
